src/**/*.{svelte,css,ts}: bash -c "! grep -n -E 'color:\s*#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}|color:\s*#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}|background(-color)?:\s*#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}|background(-color)?:\s*#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}|border-color:\s*#[0-9a-fA-F]{3}|border-color:\s*#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}' $FILE || (echo '❌ Hardcoded hex color in' $FILE >&2; exit 1)"
